Title: Shijô saikyô no senshi wa Gokû no ani datta!
Writer: Akira Toriyama, Takao Koyama, Katsuyuki Sumizawa
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Hiromi Tsuru, Mayumi Tanaka
Plot: Friends arrives at Kame Sen'nin house for a reunion, but an alien warrior crashes the party. He reveals himself to be Raditz, Son Goku's older brother, and he explains the history of the Saiyan-jin. He also reveals that Kakarotto ...
